Component Library

MultiSow Design System

Enterprise-grade component library with consistent design tokens, accessibility features, and performance optimizations.

Design Tokens

Colors

Success / Primary
Warning
Error
Info

Surfaces

Background
Surface
Elevated

Typography

Primary text

Secondary text

Muted text

Borders

Subtle
Default

Layout

Page structure and navigation components

  • PageLayoutStandard page wrapper with title and header
  • SidebarLayoutApplication shell with collapsible sidebar
  • SidebarNavigation sidebar with links and sections

UI Primitives

Core building blocks for interfaces

  • GlassCardGlassmorphism card container with blur backdrop
  • BadgeStatus labels with color variants
  • ChipInteractive pills for tags and filters
  • TooltipContextual hints on hover
  • ProgressLinear and circular progress indicators
  • DividerSection separators with optional labels
  • AvatarUser avatars with fallback initials
  • SkeletonLoading placeholders

Forms

Input components and validation

  • InputText input with variants and states
  • TextareaMulti-line text input
  • SelectDropdown selection
  • CheckboxToggle checkboxes
  • SwitchOn/off toggle switches
  • RadioRadio button groups
  • FormFieldLabel, input, and error wrapper

Actions

Buttons and interactive controls

  • ButtonButton variants: primary, secondary, ghost, danger
  • IconButtonCompact icon-only buttons
  • ButtonGroupGrouped button actions
  • SplitButtonAction with dropdown menu
  • LoadingButtonButton with loading spinner

Feedback

Alerts and notifications

  • AlertInline status messages
  • BannerFull-width announcements
  • StatusIndicatorOnline/offline dots
  • CalloutHighlighted information blocks

Overlays

Modals, drawers, and toasts

  • ModalDialog windows with backdrop
  • DrawerSlide-out side panels
  • ToastTemporary notification messages
  • ToastProviderContext provider for toast system

Data Display

Tables, lists, and data presentation

  • DataTableSortable, filterable data tables
  • SimpleTableBasic table primitives
  • ListVertical item lists with variants
  • DescriptionListKey-value pair display
  • PaginationPage navigation controls
  • EmptyStateNo data placeholders

Navigation

Tabs, breadcrumbs, and menus

  • TabsTabbed content navigation
  • BreadcrumbPage hierarchy nav
  • NavListSidebar navigation list

Theme

Theming and appearance

  • ThemeProviderContext provider for theme management
  • ThemeToggleLight/dark mode toggle button
  • ThemeSelectorTheme picker with system option

Performance

Optimization utilities

  • createLazyComponentLazy loading with suspense
  • useIntersectionIntersection observer hook
  • useDebounceDebounced value hook
  • useVirtualListVirtualized list rendering
  • OptimizedImageNext.js Image wrapper with blur-up
  • RenderWhenVisibleRender children when in viewport

Accessibility

A11y utilities and helpers

  • SkipLinkSkip to main content link
  • VisuallyHiddenScreen reader-only text
  • FocusTrapTrap focus within element
  • AnnounceARIA live announcements
  • MotionPreferencesProviderRespect reduced motion

Quick Start

Import Components

// UI Components
import { GlassCard, GlassCardHeader, GlassCardContent } from '@/components/ui/GlassCard';
import { Button, IconButton, ButtonGroup } from '@/components/ui/buttons';
import { Input, Select, Checkbox, Switch } from '@/components/ui/forms';
import { Badge, Chip, Tooltip, Progress } from '@/components/ui/primitives';

// Overlays
import { Modal, useModal } from '@/components/overlays/Modal';
import { Drawer, useDrawer } from '@/components/overlays/Drawer';
import { ToastProvider, useToast } from '@/components/overlays/Toast';

// Tables
import { DataTable, List, Pagination, EmptyState } from '@/components/tables';

// Theme
import { ThemeProvider, ThemeToggle } from '@/components/theme';

// Utilities
import { useDebounce, useIntersection, OptimizedImage } from '@/components/utils';

Using Design Tokens

// Tailwind classes use CSS custom properties
<div className="bg-background text-text-primary border-border-subtle">
  <span className="text-success">Success text</span>
  <div className="bg-surface-elevated">Elevated surface</div>
</div>

// Direct CSS variable access
const styles = {
  backgroundColor: 'var(--color-surface)',
  borderColor: 'var(--color-border-default)',
};
